differential_diagnoses: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) with neuropsychiatric involvement
Disseminated malignancy with non-bacterial thrombotic endocarditis
next_steps: Perform transesophageal echocardiography (TEE) to assess for vegetations
Order antiphospholipid antibody panel (Lupus anticoagulant, anticardiolipin, anti-beta-2 glycoprotein I)
Request peripheral blood smear review for schistocytes and markers of hemolysis
Check serum complement levels (C3, C4) and ANA/anti-dsDNA
Consult Infectious Disease for broad-spectrum coverage adjustment (including Bartonella and HACEK organisms)
Monitor for worsening respiratory distress and titrate mechanical ventilation settings to manage pulmonary hemorrhage/edema
Perform CT angiography of the brain to evaluate for mycotic aneurysm given the SAH and focal infarcts
